## Summary

-

## Testing

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` for UI changes

## Checklist

- [ ] Public text is English-only.
- [ ] No secrets, local data, SQLite files, or private notes are committed.
- [ ] Deploy changes consider macOS, Linux, and Windows.
- [ ] Docker/Compose changes include or update tests.
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior changes.
